case_title: ROTH RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. IVONNE CORTEZ et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY NABAVI ESQ, ALI

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED AT 9:20 AM. RULING: THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING IS VACATED DUE TO IMPROPER NOTICE OF THE TIME OF THE HEARING ON THE MOTION. THE NOTICED MOTION INDICATED THE MATTER WAS TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 AM AND THEREFORE PLAINTIFF ROTH RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 18, 2013 AT 9:00 AM. REBECCA WOODSON, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ARGUED, PLAINTIFF ROTH RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IVONNE CORTEZ SHALL SERVE RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION (SET ONE), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) ON OR BEFORE MARCH 1, 2013. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $775.00 IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY IS PREPARE THE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Set For Trial On Jul-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ali Nabavi, Coastal Law Firm, 949.751.6788. appearing for the Plaintiff;
Ivonne Cortez, Defendant and self-represented litigant, appears.

Ruling: the tentative ruling is adopted, PLAINTIFF ROTH RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, INC.'s Motion For Order Compelling Response To Discovery is GRANTED. Defendant IVONNE CORTEZ shall serve responses, without objection, to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories (Set One), Requests for Admission (Set One), Request for Production of Documents (Set One), and Special Interrogatories (Set One) on or before March 1, 2013. Defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $775.00 is GRANTED. The moving party is prepare the form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Continued To Jan-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ivonne Cortez, Defendant/self-represented litigant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

No appearance by the Plaintiff. Defendant appeared at 9:20 am.

Ruling: the Court's tentative ruling is vacated due to improper notice of the time of the hearing on the motion. The noticed motion indicated the matter was to be heard at 9:30 am and therefore PLAINTIFF ROTH RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, INC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Response To Discovery is continued to January 18, 2013 at 9:00 am. Rebecca Woodson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
